title: mcvaughia piauhiensis
intro: Mcvaughia piauhiensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae, native to Hawaii. It is also known as the Piauhi, and its leaves and stems have been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for their medicinal properties. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin, as well as reduce pain and swelling. Herbal preparations of Mcvaughia piauhiensis, such as tinctures and salves, can be used to treat a variety of health issues, including skin irritations and wounds.
